message:
fix(compaction,extensions,interactive): heuristic token fallback, module path traversal guard, and config-driven queue modes

- compaction.rs: fall back to heuristic token estimation when the
  provider returns zero usage metrics, preventing the context-usage
  estimate from collapsing to 0 and triggering premature compaction
- extensions_js.rs: validate that dist→src fallback paths stay within
  the canonical extension roots before returning them, blocking a path
  traversal vector where a repaired module path could escape the
  sandboxed extension directory; also refactored object property
  iteration to use idiomatic enumerate() and added clippy suppression
  for resolve_module_path length
- ext_session.rs: replaced hardcoded "one-at-a-time" steering and
  follow-up queue mode strings with config-driven values from
  Config::steering_queue_mode() and Config::follow_up_queue_mode(),
  enabling runtime queue mode selection; added test coverage for the
  new config-driven state reporting

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
